Features Download Support FAQ

Support the Project

Sylvelle is free and always will be. If you'd like to help keep it alive and growing — thank you. It means more than you know.

Ko-fi

A one-time or monthly donation — whatever feels right. Every contribution helps keep Sylvelle maintained and growing.

Support on Ko-fi

Patreon

Monthly tiers with behind-the-scenes development updates. See what's being built, why, and what's coming next.

Join on Patreon

Send a Gift

Want to send something more personal? Browse the wishlist and send a gift directly to the creator — no address required.

Throne acts as a shipping proxy: you buy an item, they forward it to the creator. Your address and the creator's address are never shared with each other.

View Wishlist on Throne

Every donation goes directly toward development time, hosting, and keeping the app free for everyone.
